name: Doosan Infracore Co., Ltd.
summary: Doosan Infracore Co., Ltd. engages in the infrastructure support business in South Korea and internationally. It manufactures and sells construction equipment, engines, attachments, and utility equipment. The company offers excavators, wheel loaders, portable air compressors, articulated dump trucks, lighting systems, and portable power equipment. It also provides cabin raisers, module units, tilting and elevating cabins, buckets, grapples, crushers, demolition equipment, and material handling equipment. In addition, the company offers off-highway and on-highway, and marine diesel engines, and gas engines for buses and trucks, power generators, and ships; and parts and services. It sells its products under the Doosan, Bobcat, and Geith brands. Doosan Infracore Co., Ltd. was founded in 1937 and is headquartered in Incheon, South Korea.
